S.FORM: == Rajmonda Bulku == kawas tay 1958, Rajmonda Bulku, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == rajmon*a βulku == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rajmon*a βulku, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ

S.PHON: == rajmon*a βulku == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rajmon*a βulku, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
